title: OldGL
description: Allows Sandy Bridge users to run Minecraft 1.17+
body:
THIS IS NOT AN OPTIMIZATION MOD! IT ONLY EXISTS TO MAKE THE GAME ABLE TO LAUNCH!
This should work with most mods, but if they use OGL 3.2+ functions (ex. Sodium) the game WILL crash

Ever since Minecraft 1.17 the HD 3000 and other OpenGL 3.0 and 3.1 GPUS have not been able to run Minecraft on Windows without software rendering. I made a hacky mod to fix that.
